name: Smart Technologies — Solutions Engineer
description: Running Cloud & Security operations across multiple Microsoft 365 tenants — Entra ID identity governance, Conditional Access, PIM, Defender XDR triage, Microsoft Sentinel monitoring, and Intune CIS-aligned baselines.

name: Cyber Secured India Internship
description: 3-month structured internship covering Web & Mobile Application Penetration Testing, Privilege Escalation techniques, Digital Forensics tooling, and Cloud Security fundamentals.

name: Certifence Pentest Internship
description: Worked through professional pentest engagements on real client web apps. Got hands-on with SQLmap, Nessus, Acunetix, Bloodhound, Metasploit, and Cobalt Strike. Wrote my first professional pentest report.

name: WebBattalion Blue Team Internship
description: First professional security role — performed pentesting on real-world targets, learned to write structured reports, and built my first SIEM home lab using Wazuh and Splunk on the Blue Team side.

name: BSc in Computer Science & Engineering
description: Completed a BSc in Computer Science & Engineering with a 3.63 CGPA. Coursework covered networking, OS internals, database systems, and software engineering — the foundation that the security stack sits on.

name: AZ-500 Passed on First Attempt
description: Passed AZ-500 (Azure Security Engineer Associate) on first attempt — a major milestone for my cloud security track. Studied alongside hands-on tenant work which made practical questions intuitive.
